evidence.title: Business Insider report on Mark Epstein forgery challenge and note provenance - relevant extract
evidence.source_description: Relevant text extracted from Business Insider article by Jacob Shamsian, published 2026-05-08T20:44:17.764Z, retrieved during defendant investigation on 2026-06-30 UTC. Extract preserves Mark Epstein's forgery challenge, note provenance as reported, and caveats that cut both ways including prior sealing and absence from DOJ/IG materials.
evidence.relevance: Adverse-authenticity source for defense merits argument. It reports a close family member disputing authorship and explains why; it also includes facts relevant to source-chain weight and counterweight to the forgery theory.

evidence.title: SDNY unsealing order in United States v. Tartaglione, No. 16-CR-832 (KMK) - relevant extract
evidence.source_description: Relevant text extracted from official Southern District of New York PDF order dated May 6, 2026, retrieved during plaintiff investigation on 2026-06-30 UTC. Local downloaded PDF sha256 observed: 7225441cb802084e2b9485ebc2c6d246fbfa08e109fe650cb14f445dc4745ca0; size 128,992 bytes. Extract preserves the parts material to unsealing, provenance, and caveats.
evidence.relevance: Official court order is the primary source showing a U.S. District Judge granted unsealing of the note before the May 8 deadline and describes the note's claimed provenance while using caveating language relevant to weight.

evidence.title: PBS NewsHour / Associated Press report on Epstein note release - relevant extract
evidence.source_description: Relevant text extracted from PBS NewsHour article carrying Associated Press reporting by Michael R. Sisak and Larry Neumeister. Retrieved as HTML on 2026-06-30 UTC; local downloaded HTML sha256 observed: 7bc6354f83080c555ecb4ab0c17eb26bde83c6a1830ad012aed37e0122008e3b; size 246,650 bytes. Extract omits navigation, donation prompts, and unrelated page chrome.
evidence.relevance: Credible reporting source showing the note was made public on May 6, 2026, describing it as purportedly written by Epstein, giving reported note text and circumstances, and preserving adverse caveats about authorship and official records.
